prompt_text: Create a healthy weekly meal plan for a college student with a busy schedule who has only 20 minutes to cook per day.
response_text:
# Quick & Healthy Weekly Meal Plan (20 min/day)

## Strategy
- **Sunday prep**: 30 min of chopping/cooking base ingredients
- **Weekday cooking**: Simple assembly and quick cooking
- **Freezer-friendly**: Most meals reheat well

---

## Sunday Prep (30 minutes)
- Cook 2 cups brown rice
- Grill/bake 2 lbs chicken breast
- Roast sheet pan: broccoli, bell peppers, sweet potato
- Cook 1 pot lentil soup

---

## Daily Meal Ideas

### **Monday**
- **Breakfast**: Overnight oats (prep night before)
- **Lunch**: Chicken + rice + roasted veggies
- **Dinner**: Pasta with jarred marinara, frozen spinach (15 min)

### **Tuesday**
- **Breakfast**: Yogurt + granola + berries
- **Lunch**: Lentil soup + whole grain bread
- **Dinner**: Stir-fry (prep veggies, cook noodles, add protein) (18 min)

### **Wednesday**
- **Breakfast**: Scrambled eggs + toast
- **Lunch**: Chicken grain bowl with roasted veggies
- **Dinner**: Quesadillas with canned beans + cheese (12 min)

### **Thursday**
- **Breakfast**: Smoothie (frozen fruit, yogurt, spinach)
- **Lunch**: Lentil soup + salad
- **Dinner**: Canned tuna + whole wheat pasta + frozen peas (15 min)

### **Friday**
- **Breakfast**: Cereal + milk + fruit
- **Lunch**: Leftover stir-fry
- **Dinner**: **Treat yourself**: Order out or simple frozen pizza

### **Saturday**
- **Breakfast**: Pancakes (frozen, reheat)
- **Lunch**: Chickpea salad (canned chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, dressing)
- **Dinner**: Egg fried rice with frozen veggies (16 min)

### **Sunday**
- **Breakfast**: Avocado toast
- **Lunch**: Meal prep for next week
- **Dinner**: Sheet pan salmon + roasted vegetables (20 min)

---

## Time-Saving Staples
✓ Canned beans, lentils, tuna  
✓ Frozen vegetables & fruit  
✓ Rotisserie chicken (when short on time)  
✓ Jarred sauces, peanut butter  
✓ Eggs, Greek yogurt, cheese  
✓ Quick-cook grains (rice, pasta, instant oats)  
✓ Pre-cut veggies (when budget allows)

---

## Budget Tips
- Buy rice/pasta in bulk
- Choose eggs as affordable protein
- Use seasonal produce
- Buy store brands

This plan balances nutrition, convenience, and realistic college life!
